dosen_pengampu: I Wayan Septa Malan Vergantana, S.Kom., M.Kom.

cpmk.deskripsi: Mampu memahami konsep dan evolusi sistem operasi serta arsitektur dasar (kernel, mode user/kernel)
Mampu menjelaskan manajemen proses dan thread, serta algoritma penjadwalan CPU
Mampu menjelaskan sinkronisasi proses, deadlock, dan mekanisme penanganannya
Mampu menjelaskan manajemen memori (paging, segmentation, virtual memory) dan manajemen sistem file
Mampu menjelaskan keamanan, proteksi, serta sistem operasi modern (Linux, Windows, Android)

materi_minggu_1: Definisi OS, fungsi (resource manager, extended machine), kernel, system call
materi_minggu_2: Struktur OS, system call, API, layanan OS, booting
materi_minggu_3: Sejarah OS, perbandingan karakteristik, contoh OS setiap era
materi_minggu_4: Proses, PCB, state (new, ready, running, waiting, terminated), thread, perbedaan proses dan thread
materi_minggu_6: Round Robin, multilevel queue, multilevel feedback queue, evaluasi algoritma
materi_minggu_7: Critical section, Peterson solution, semaphore, mutex, monitor, producer-consumer, readers-writers
materi_minggu_9: Deadlock characterization, resource allocation graph, deadlock prevention, avoidance (banker), detection, recovery
materi_minggu_10: Alokasi kontigu, fragmentasi, swapping, paging, page table, TLB
materi_minggu_11: Segmentation, segment table, kelebihan/kekurangan, contoh Intel 80386
materi_minggu_12: Demand paging, page fault handling, copy-on-write, page replacement algorithms, working set, thrashing
materi_minggu_13: File concept, directory structure, file allocation (contiguous, linked, indexed), free space management, I/O hardware, interrupt
materi_minggu_14: Domain of protection, access matrix, capability, ACL, authentication, malware, defense
